---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
A clear one-line description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the approach you have in mind.

## Adapter impact
Does this require changes to the `ThreadStore`, `ConfigStore`, or `Logger` interfaces? If so, describe the interface additions or changes.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you evaluated and why you ruled them out.
